calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, March 23, 2016, in Department 525:
C & C SF Office of Treasurer Tax Collector, Respondent/Plaintiff appears by Charlotte Hastings, Senior Collection Officer.
Kevin Gilheany, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. This matter continued from 1/14/2015; all parties are sworn. Stipulation and Order to Use Judge Pro Tem is on file.
Ms. Hastings testifies on behalf of C & C SF Office of Treasurer Tax Collector and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - 01/21/2016 letter of coverage from Health San Francisco Program Manager.

Appellant/Defendant, Mr. Gilheany testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - 12/08/2015 letter, 11/10/2015 e-mail, copy of check, etc.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Continued To Mar-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 14, 2016, in Department 525:
C & C SF of Treasurer Tax Collector, Respondent/Plaintiff appears by Charlotte Hastings/Senior Collection Officer.
Kevin Gilheany, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Ms. Hastings testifies on behalf C & C SF of Treasurer Tax Collector and responds to the questions from the Court.

Appellant/Defendant, Kevin Gilheany testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1)- 01/13/2016 e-mail from Healthy SF, Dec. 8, 2015 Healthy SF letter to Mr. Gilhany, Payment History 5/24/2010-9/15/2015, image of Check #115, 11/10/2015
E-mail from Frank Sam of Healthy SF.

After Ms. Hastings and Mr. Gilheany spoke with Frank Sam, customer service representative of Healthy San Franscisco, on court speaker phone, Ms. Hastings needed more dicussions/clarafication with Healthy San Francisco. Therefore, the Court continued the matter to March 2, 2016 for parties' settlement discussions with Healthy San Francisco. Both parties agreed on the continuance date in Open Court.

Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Judgment Entered
